content:
📜 Students who do not participate will begin to “disappear” like ghosts and must earn their way back into the narrative.

✔ How Disappearance Works:
• Every time a student skips participation when called upon, they lose visibility in the game world.
• After three absences of interaction, they become a Specter (Ghost Status).

✔ Ghost Status Penalties:
• Cannot claim items or power-ups.
• Factions cannot vote for them in decisions.
• Lose ability to roll for skill checks.

✔ How To Return From Ghost Status:
• Must complete a redemption quest to re-enter the game.
• Example: Must complete a special literary analysis, win a debate, or perform a skill check.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Forces players to stay engaged or suffer real consequences.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 453 (chunk 453/555)
